ModMetaData.name: [RH2] Rimmu-Nation² - Clothing
ModMetaData.author: Chicken Plucker
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE/Vile's conversion by CarbineAction. Balanced and converted to work with Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, and Vile's Materials Science. Self-contained — no manual edits needed. Drop in and play.
Converted: 153 apparel (16 tops, 12 pants, 13 shells, 10 hats, 7 masks, 3 bandanas, 1 scarf, 5 eye/ear pro, 6 respirators, 20 webbing, 26 body armor, 26 helmets, 8 special sets, 31 backpacks)
Changes: - 153 apparel items converted to HSK parent classes - Armor uses StrongMetallic stuff with HSK materials (Compaste, Kevlar, SyntheticFibers) - Clothing uses Fabric/Leathery stuff - CE apparel stats tuned to HSK values - Root Assemblies folder removed (Prepatcher compatibility)
Credits: fiendakko - Apparel art Tittymcswaggy - Apparel art DanDMan68 - Apparel art JDS - Apparel art Odstriman - Apparel art Jecrell - Backpacks.dll C# Mehni - Backpacks.dll 1.2 update Taranchuk - Backpacks.dll 1.6 update
Supporters: Sheriff Morphium
Referenced Companies: 5.11 Flyye MIL-TEC Maxpedition Wasing Team Wendy TripleAughtDesign Vestguard
